_comment: War Loops fidelity signal panel. One control surface: toggle signals, set weights (renormalized over enabled signals), tune the pass bar. Weights are relative. The current weights are calibration PRIORS; scripts/calibrate.mjs fits them against human ratings of the benchmark corpus and writes signals.config.suggested.json.

signals.name: perceptual
signals.note: SSIM: structural similarity to the reference (non-LLM). Noisy on rich pages; kept as a weak corroborator.

signals.name: gist
signals.note: overall resemblance: low-res correlation + color histogram (non-LLM, local, no deps)

signals.name: layout
signals.note: vertical section-boundary alignment: same horizontal bands in the same positions, ref vs render (non-LLM, symmetric)

signals.name: tokens
signals.note: extracted color/type tokens vs the built .pen (deterministic)

signals.name: vision
signals.note: claude vision judge: subjective fidelity (LLM), one weighted voice

signals.name: motion
signals.note: EXPERIENTIAL axis (reported separately, not blended): how much of the reference's motion the build reproduces
